docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $617.01 FILED BY TERDIMAN, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT SPRUCE POWER LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE. SERVED APR-29-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SPRUCE POWER LLC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF RICHARD TERDIMAN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT SPRUCE POWER LLC IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
ORDER FOR DISMISSAL W/O PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PARTIES.
